2237710.name: Dead of The Sea
2237710.description: Dead of the sea is a pirate-themed VR multiplayer survival shooter where you can join your fellow pirates to end the curse of the Island of Lost Souls. Survive waves of the island's deadly inhabitants while collecting magical power by defeating enemies. Unlock new abilities, upgrade your weapons, and discover the secrets of the strange island. From the chaotic waves of Shipwreck Beach, haunting ghost town of The Village, the island's deep and dangerous Jungle tundras, damp and claustrophobic Caves and Coves to the Witch Kings ancient Temple of Dark Magic, the Island of Lost Souls is named as such for a reason: the many adventurers and privateers who do not return!
2237710.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
